creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
The security/dirmngr port build fails at the linking stage.

cc -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -march=athlon64 -DLDAP_DEPRECATED -fno-strict-
aliasing -Wall -Wno-pointer-sign  -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -o dirmngr_l
dap dirmngr_ldap-dirmngr_ldap.o dirmngr_ldap-no-libgcrypt.o   ../jnlib/libjnlib.
a  -L/usr/local/lib -lgpg-error -lldap
/usr/bin/ld: :: invalid DSO for symbol `ber_free' definition
/usr/local/lib/liblber-2.4.so.8: could not read symbols: Bad value
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
gmake[4]: *** [dirmngr_ldap] Error 1
gmake[4]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/security/dirmngr/work/dirmngr-1.1.0/src'
gmake[3]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/security/dirmngr/work/dirmngr-1.1.0'
gmake[2]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/security/dirmngr/work/dirmngr-1.1.0'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.

How-To-Repeat: 	Try to build the port on recent versions of FreeBSD 10 or FreeBSD 11
